name: Stuffed Portabello Burger with Vegetarian Herb Aioli
recipeIngredient: 1 small green onion; white part only, chopped
2 ounces smoked gouda, grated (may double the gouda or use an alternative)
2 round sandwich rolls, such as panini or kaiser, halved
recipeInstructions:
AIOLI: Process mayonnaise, garlic, lemon juice, green onion, and rosemary in a food processor until finely minced and well blended (about 45 seconds). Transfer to a small bowl. Add parsley and pepper to taste; stir to blend. Cover and refrigerate.
BURGER: Brush dirt from mushroom caps. Remove and discard the stems. Combine olive oil and garlic in a small bowl. Brush both sides of mushroom caps with garlic oil and sprinkle with salt. Place on grill over medium-hot coals or on a grill pan over medium-high heat, underside down, and cook until mushrooms begin to soften (about 6 minutes). Turn over and sprinkle cheese evenly over mushrooms. Continue grilling until mushrooms are soft and cheese is melted (4-5 minutes). Spread 1 tablespoon aioli on the bottom half of each roll. Place a mushroom cap on the bottom half. Top with tomato slice and top half of roll.
